name: Trenette with Pesto, Potatoes and Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 cup packed fresh basil leaves (2 bunches)
6 tablespoons freshly grated Pecorino Romano cheese
2 medium russet potatoes, peeled, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
6 ounces green beans, trimmed, cut into 3-inch lengths
Additional freshly grated Pecorino Romano cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely grind basil, olive oil, 6 tablespoons each of Pecorino Romano and Parmesan cheeses, toasted pine nuts, and minced garlic in a processor. Season pesto to taste with salt and pepper.
2. Cook potatoes in a large pot of boiling salted water until just tender, about 5 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer potatoes to a large bowl.
3. Add green beans to the same pot and cook until crisp-tender, about 3 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer them to the bowl with the potatoes.
4. Cook pasta in the same pot until tender but still firm to bite. Drain, reserving half cup of cooking liquid. Transfer pasta to the bowl with potatoes and green beans.
5. Whisk reserved 1/2 cup cooking liquid into pesto. Add pesto to the pasta mixture and toss thoroughly to coat. Transfer pasta to a large platter. Serve, passing additional Pecorino Romano cheese separately.
